title: Cyclosorus deltipterus
intro: Cyclosorus deltipterus, also known as the silver sori fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing pain and improving overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Cyclosorus deltipterus include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Cyclosorus deltipterus is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in the production of herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures.

constituents: Cyclosorus deltipterus, commonly known as the Chinese leather fern, contains various active constituents. side_effects: Cyclosorus deltipterus, also known as the Asian chain fern, is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine.
